name: Ube Baby
tagline: Sweet dreams. Share love. Shine softly.
shortDescription: Ube Baby is the dreamy, gentle sparkle of Fruit Baby Universe! Soft, imaginative, and full of cozy magic, Ube Baby loves making friends feel safe, loved, and inspired. Though a little shy at first, Ube Baby shines through kindness, wonder, and sweet little wishes.
about: Ube Baby is the dreamy, gentle sparkle of Fruit Baby Universe. Soft, imaginative, and full of cozy magic, Ube Baby loves making friends feel safe, loved, and inspired. Though a little shy at first, Ube Baby shines through kindness, wonder, and sweet little wishes.
personality: Imaginative — sees magic in little things
Shy — quiet at first, but warm with friends

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Round, soft purple body with a bright green leafy top. Big sparkly eyes, pink blush cheeks, and a gentle dreamy expression. Radiates cozy, magical warmth.

storyRole: The emotional heart of the group. Ube Baby brings creativity, empathy, and calm to difficult moments. Often the one who finds a gentle solution.

always: Offer comfort when friends are upset

signatureStyle: Dreamy, cozy, and softly magical. Ube Baby sprinkles comfort, wonder, and sweet sparkle wherever she goes.
catchphrases: Everything feels better with a little cozy magic.
I believe in you — and in us.

image.alt: Ube Baby — a soft round purple character with a green leafy top, dreamy eyes, and a gentle smile
